mapper.select: SELECT r.reviewNo, r.memberId, r.productNo, p.productName, r.reviewContents, r.reviewUpdated, r.reviewStarAvg, r.reviewStarDurability, r.reviewStarPrice, r.reviewStarDesign, r.reviewStarDelivery FROM review r JOIN product p ON r.productNo = p.productNo WHERE r.memberId = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review(reviewNo, memberId, orderNo, productNo, reviewContents, reviewUpdated, reviewStarAvg, reviewStarDurability, reviewStarPrice, reviewStarDesign, reviewStarDelivery, productName) VALUES(nextval('review_seq'), #{memberId}, #{orderNo}, #{productNo}, #{reviewContents}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{reviewStarAvg}, #{reviewStarDurability}, #{reviewStarPrice}, #{reviewStarDesign}, #{reviewStarDelivery}, (SELECT productName FROM product WHERE productNo = #{productNo}) )
INSERT INTO image (imageNo, articleNo, imageFilename, imageUpdated, imageType) VALUES (nextval('image_seq'), #{articleNo}, #{imageFilename}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{imageType})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM review WHERE productName = #{productName} ORDER BY reviewUpdated DESC
